name: resly-open-api
description: Claude Desktop extension for the Resly Open API demo CLI.

resly_cli_path.title: Resly CLI path
resly_cli_path.description: Path to the installed resly binary. Use 'resly' when it is already on PATH.

resly_base_url.title: Resly base URL
resly_base_url.description: Use the test API for demos unless production access is explicitly required.

resly_api_key.title: Resly API key
resly_api_key.description: Optional for fixture-only demos. Stored securely by Claude Desktop when configured.
